glosses.ja: 保証する; 確実にする

translations.fr: Je ne peux pas le garantir.
translations.he: אני לא יכול להבטיח את זה.
translations.vi: Tôi không thể đảm bảo điều đó.
translations.hi: मैं यह गारंटी नहीं दे सकता।
translations.ja: それは保証できません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person singular present indicative; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Neuter pronoun used as direct object (accusative); refers to a previously mentioned or understood entity.
Negation particle; negates the clause.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'kann'.

sentences.target: Der Verkäufer will den Preis nicht garantieren.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔʏfɐ vɪl deːn pʁaɪ̯s nɪçt ɡaʁanˈtiːʁən/

translations.de: Der Verkäufer will den Preis nicht garantieren.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔʏfɐ vɪl deːn pʁaɪ̯s nɪçt ɡaʁanˈtiːʁən/
translations.en: The salesperson won't guarantee the price.
translations.es: El vendedor no quiere garantizar el precio.
translations.fr: Le vendeur ne veut pas garantir le prix.
translations.it: Il venditore non vuole garantire il prezzo.
translations.zh-Hans: 售货员不愿意保证价格。
translations.pt: O vendedor não quer garantir o preço.
translations.he: המוכר לא מוכן להבטיח את המחיר.
translations.vi: Nhân viên bán hàng không muốn đảm bảo giá.
translations.ar: البائع لا يريد أن يضمن السعر.
translations.nl: De verkoper wil de prijs niet garanderen.
translations.hu: Az eladó nem akarja garantálni az árat.
translations.hi: विक्रेता कीमत की गारंटी नहीं देना चाहता।
translations.el: Ο πωλητής δεν θέλει να εγγυηθεί την τιμή.
translations.ro: Vânzătorul nu vrea să garanteze prețul.
translations.ja: 店員は値段を保証したくありません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; marks the head noun 'Verkäufer' as the subject.
Count noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; expresses volition and selects a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiners the direct object noun 'Preis'.
Noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'garantieren'.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Der Vertrag soll schnelle Hilfe garantieren.

translations.de: Der Vertrag soll schnelle Hilfe garantieren.
translations.en: The contract is supposed to guarantee quick help.
translations.es: Se supone que el contrato garantiza ayuda rápida.
translations.fr: Le contrat est censé garantir une aide rapide.
translations.it: Il contratto dovrebbe garantire un aiuto rapido.
translations.ko: 계약은 빠른 도움을 보장하도록 되어 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 合同应该保证快速的帮助。
translations.yue: 合約應該保證快速嘅幫助。
translations.pt: O contrato deve garantir ajuda rápida.
translations.tr: Sözleşmenin hızlı yardımı garanti etmesi gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Hợp đồng được cho là bảo đảm hỗ trợ nhanh.
translations.ar: العقد من المفترض कि يضمن مساعدة سريعة.
translations.nl: Het contract zou snelle hulp moeten garanderen.
translations.hu: A szerződésnek gyors segítséget kell garantálnia.
translations.hi: अनुबंध को जल्दी मदद की गारंटी देनी चाहिए।
translations.el: Το συμβόλαιο υποτίθεται ότι εγγυάται γρήγορη βοήθεια.
translations.id: Kontrak ini seharusnya menjamin bantuan cepat.
translations.ro: Contractul ar trebui să garanteze ajutor rapid.
translations.ja: 契約は迅速な支援を保証することになっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; marks 'Vertrag' as the subject.
Noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; expresses obligation/expectation and selects a bare infinitive complement.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Hilfe'.
Noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'garantieren'.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary 'soll'.

sentences.target: Ich kann dir gute Qualität garantieren.

translations.de: Ich kann dir gute Qualität garantieren.
translations.en: I can guarantee you good quality.
translations.fr: Je peux te garantir une bonne qualité.
translations.ko: 좋은 품질을 보장해 드릴 수 있어요.
translations.yue: 我可以向你保證有好嘅質素。
translations.ru: Я могу гарантировать тебе хорошее качество.
translations.he: אני יכול להבטיח לך איכות טובה.
translations.vi: Tôi có thể đảm bảo cho bạn chất lượng tốt.
translations.ar: أستطيع أن أضمن لك جودة جيدة.
translations.nl: Ik kan je goede kwaliteit garanderen.
translations.uk: Я можу гарантувати тобі хорошу якість.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें अच्छी गुणवत्ता की गारंटी दे सकता हूँ।
translations.el: Μπορώ να σου εγγυηθώ καλή ποιότητα.
translations.nb: Jeg kan garantere deg god kvalitet.
translations.id: Saya bisa menjamin kualitas yang baik untukmu.
translations.sv: Jag kan garantera dig bra kvalitet.
translations.ro: Îți pot garanta o calitate bună.
translations.da: Jeg kan garantere dig god kvalitet.
translations.ja: あなたに良い品質を保証できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person singular present indicative; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Qualität'.
Noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'garantieren'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'kann'.
